creator: mrrrrrrr@gmail.com
text:
The KDevelop port is behind the latest stable - and the current version it tries to fetch has been removed from the stable trees it seems, as all of the KDE mirrors show. It does however show up in the Attic.

===>  Giving up on fetching files: KDE/kdevelop-3.5.3.tar.bz2 KDE/kdevelop-3.5.3.tar.bz2

Fix: 

could the distfiles be updated to working mirrors or the port itself, updated (3.5.3 -> 3.5.4) :)
How-To-Repeat: Try to install the KDevelop port (devel/kdevelop)
